universe.description: 75-name universe: top U.S. mega/large-cap stocks by market cap with full GICS sector coverage (3-5+ names per sector).

market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P +0.67%, Nasdaq +0.89%, Dow +0.32%. Technology led sectors (+3.06%) while Utilities lagged (-1.83%). Claude Sonnet 4.6 led the day at +0.01%. 3 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +8.66%. Key headline: Global economic outlook darkens as policymakers count cost of Iran war - Financial Times — headwind for risk assets.
